problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Combining Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
